name: InfluxDB
description: Time-series metrics backend. Stores metrics from Alloy via Prometheus remote write.
longDescription: Deploys InfluxDB 3 Core as a time-series metrics backend. Alloy writes metrics via the Prometheus remote write endpoint. Query data using InfluxQL or SQL in the InfluxDB UI at http://localhost:8181.
author: Kleff

config.label: Database
config.description: InfluxDB database name. Created automatically on first write.

config.label: Admin Token
config.description: InfluxDB admin token used by Alloy to write metrics. Set this to a strong secret.

config.label: External InfluxDB URL
config.description: Override to use an external InfluxDB 3 instance. Leave blank to use the bundled companion.
